description: THE single source of truth for character/agent dimensions and every clearance derived from them. Change a body here, re-run the gates, and every validator, bake, and walktest agrees. See AGENT_CONTRACT.md for the derivation rules and what to re-run after a change.

npc_standard.note: cops/civilians share player metrics until a distinct class ships

nav_bake.note: radius = fattest navigating character + 0.05 safety. max_slope sits ABOVE the steepest legal stair pitch (~45 deg; slope legality is validate.py's job, connectivity is the bake's). Voxel erosion is ceil(radius/cell) whole cells per side -- keep cell_size small enough that legal doors survive (see clearances.min_door_width_m derivation).

clearances.derivation: min_door_width >= 2*ceil(agent_radius/cell_size)*cell_size + 2*cell_size  ->  2*ceil(0.4/0.15)*0.15 + 0.3 = 1.2; ratified 1.25 for margin. min_corridor = 2*agent_radius + 0.3 body margin.
